title: selago ferruginea
intro: Selago ferruginea, also known as the rusty pig's ear or rusty selago, is a flowering plant species native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing wounds, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Selago ferruginea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
